scripts.dev: pnpm build:tokens && pnpm copy:tokens && pnpm --filter @acme/app dev
scripts.build: pnpm build:tokens && pnpm copy:tokens && pnpm --filter @acme/app build
scripts.build-storybook: pnpm build:tokens && pnpm copy:tokens && pnpm --filter @acme/app build-storybook
scripts.storybook: pnpm build:tokens && pnpm copy:tokens && pnpm --filter @acme/app storybook
scripts.build:storybook: pnpm build:tokens && pnpm copy:tokens && pnpm --filter @acme/app build-storybook
